entries.title: OpenAI Readies Deployment of ChatGPT for 3 Million Pentagon Personnel
entries.summary: OpenAI’s ChatGPT is set to be available through the Pentagon’s generative artificial intelligence (AI) platform, GenAI.mil, in early July, Nextgov/FCW reported Tuesday (June 16). The reported cited remarks by Mohammed Husain, strategic delivery lead for cyber at OpenAI, at the Defense One Tech Summit in Virginia. GenAI.mil will make ChatGPT available to more than 3 million defense civilian and mil

entries.title: T-Mobile Puts AI Inside Cell Towers for Robots and Drones
entries.summary: Robots navigating factory floors, drones inspecting power lines, and autonomous vehicles reading traffic all share the same constraint: They need to act in milliseconds. Sending data to a distant computing facility and waiting for a response takes too long. For machines operating in the physical world, that delay can mean a missed obstacle, a wrong […] The post T-Mobile Puts AI Inside Cell T

entries.title: Apartments.com Offers Renters AI-Powered Search Options
entries.summary: Apartments.com owner CoStar Group is introducing a new artificial intelligence-powered search tool. entries.title: Top Spanish banks go live with collaborative cyber defence joint venture
entries.summary: FrauDfense, a company owned by BBVA, Banco Santander and CaixaBank, has gone live with a a technology platform aimed at preventing fraud before it occurs through the secure exchange of information between financial institutions.

entries.title: Wonder’s Robot Cooks Circles Around Every Human on the Line
entries.summary: One machine can make 500 burrito bowls, salads and poke bowls an hour. A human worker makes roughly 30 to 45. That gap is the business case Marc Lore is building Wonder around. Fortune reported that Lore unveiled the system recently. entries.title: Polymarket’s $354M Iran Dispute Exposes Prediction Markets’ Settlement Problem
entries.summary: Financial markets largely moved on after the United States and Iran announced an agreement over the weekend. On Polymarket, traders are still debating whether the event happened at all. The prediction market platform has processed more than $345 million in volume on contracts tied to a US-Iran peace deal. entries.title: Adyen leans into agentic commerce
entries.summary: Adyen, the financial technology platform of choice for leading businesses, today announced Adyen Agentic, a suite of modular APIs that enables enterprises to sell through conversational AI platforms without rebuilding their commerce systems for each new channel.

entries.title: World Cup Pushes Kalshi Past $100 Billion as Daily Volumes Cross $1 Billion
entries.summary: Kalshi crossed $100 billion in lifetime notional volume and logged its first billion-dollar trading days over the weekend, as World Cup markets drove prediction market activity to new highs. The move shows how fast sports contracts have become the sector’s main growth engine, overtaking the categories that previously carried much of the industry’s volume. entries.title: eToro Assets Reclaim $20 Billion in May as Crypto Trading Keeps Sliding
entries.summary: eToro said the value of customer assets on its platform reached $20.1 billion in May, up 18% from a year earlier, as heavy stock and commodities trading offset another drop in crypto activity. The preliminary figures also showed the trading app leaning on two recent acquisitions to lift its headline account growth. entries.summary: Instant payments platform Interchecks has secured a $50 million Series C led by Bettor Capital, Commerce Ventures, Decades Holdings, and Thayer Street Partners.
